title: Business Development Manager/Director
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and execute sales strategies to acquire new clients and grow revenue for our commercial system software.
  • Partner with customers to understand their business needs and objectives.
  • Effectively communicate the value proposition through proposals and presentations.
  • Responsible for the tender/RFQ/RFP and provide support throughout project lifecycle.
  • Coordinate closely with both internal and external stakeholders from project planning to deployment stage by ensuring timeline are met.
  • Responsible for gathering technical requirement and work with product team in developing cost effective design solution for customers.
  • Translate client requirements and feedback into product customization specifications.
  • Communicate effectively with developers to ensure timely and accurate implementation of changes
  • Provide insights on user experience and business needs to guide product enhancements.
  • Plan and execute testing to obtain customer approval on technical requirements.
  • Drive the design and execution of Proof-of-Concept (POC) demonstrations to showcase the value of our solutions.
  • Provide input on solution architecture and recommend best practices.
  • Lead product demonstrations, presentations, and negotiations with potential clients.
  • Monitor competitors, industry trends, and customer requirements to refine sales and product strategies.
  • Prepare regular reports on sales performance, forecasts, and market insights.
  • Support marketing initiatives, including speaking engagements at webinars and in-person events.
  • Contribute to the creation of technical content and resources to enhance outreach efforts.
  • Mentor and guide junior sales or business development staff (if applicable).

Requirements / Qualifications

  • Proven experience in software sales, preferably in IT solutions, SaaS, or workforce management systems.
  • Strong product management experience or background, with the ability to translate technical features into business value.
  • Excellent understanding of casual labour management systems or HR/workforce software is highly preferred.
  • Strong interpersonal, negotiation, and communication skills.
  • Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and drive results.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, IT, Engineering, or a related field. MBA is a plus.

postedCompany.description:
PROPERTY FACILITY SERVICES PTE. LTD.

Property Facility Services Pte Ltd (PFS) is one of Singapore's leading and fastest growing property and facility management companies, with a diverse portfolio of local and overseas clients ranging from residential, commercial, retail to industrial properties.
